headline: Rollins' Q1 Earnings Match Estimates, Increase Year Over Year
summary: ROL's Q1 revenues beat estimates and increase 10% y/y. Earnings rise 9% y/y, as residential, commercial and termite segments deliver solid gains.

headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Equifax, Lowers Price Target to $220
summary: UBS  analyst Kevin Mcveigh   maintains Equifax (NYSE:EFX) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $245 to $220.

headline: FICO Isn’t the Only Credit Score  for Mortgages Anymore. Fair Isaac Stock Drops.
summary: The move could open the housing market to more Americans but challenges Fair Isaac’s control of the mortgage market.

headline: Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac Move Beyond FICO With New Credit Scoring Model To Boost Competition
summary: Freddie Mac, Fannie Mae to accept VantageScore 4.0 mortgages, aiming to cut costs and boost credit scoring competition.
